##RRUFFID=R130112
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Mg_2_Mn^3+^O_2_(BO_3_)
##LOCALITY=Langban, Filipstad, Varmland, Sweden
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Opaque reddish black striated prismatic crystals, associated with calcite and granular hausmannite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130112
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
